links.context: for to see God is to die ([[EXO.33:20]]). Only One who is Himself divine can see God, and thus
His energy is not possible in this life ([[EXO.33:20]]-23; [[MAT.5:8]]; [[JOH.1:18]]; [[1CO.13:12]]; [[HEB.12:14]];
The Bridegroom warns His Bride against trying to somehow see His Divine Essence, for no one shall see Him and live ([[EXO.33:20]]). The angels, even the mighty seraphim, veil
